top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh's Fed is not expected to make any change to rates for a while, according to CNBC Fed Survey
top_signals.summary: The survey respondents do expect the Fed at this week's meeting to remove the easing bias in the statement that has signaled the Fed's next move would likely be a cut.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Changes to collateral eligibility in the Sterling Monetary Framework - Market Notice 11 June 2026
top_signals.summary: This Market Notice covers changes to the Bank’s collateral eligibility framework for the Sterling Monetary Framework (SMF).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Disney vows expansion of Shanghai park in second decade
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
